About Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC

12+ years serving Columbus and surrounding areas

Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Columbus homeowners with exceptional hardscaping services. We saw a need for reliable contractors who understood the unique challenges of the Ohio climate and could deliver lasting results.

Our approach is built on meticulous planning, skilled craftsmanship, and open communication. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using quality materials and proven techniques to ensure your outdoor space looks beautiful for years to come. We take the time to understand your vision and bring it to life with precision and care.

We're proud to be a local business, committed to serving our community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to create outdoor spaces that enhance the beauty and value of our neighborhoods.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC

Trusted hardscaping contractor professionals serving Columbus, OH and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
